svg.title: The context rot is the real wall of Agentic AI
svg.desc: Two panels — same history, two futures. Left: session history chunks feed into a faded terminal via /compact and /clear, losing 92—100% of the decisive context (entropy HIGH). Right: the same chunks feed into a belief graph orb via bella save and restore a crisp terminal via bella resume, losing only 8% (entropy LOW).
svg.text: The context rot is the real wall of Agentic AI
claude code · codex · cursor · windsurf · openclaw

g.text: asst: let me check what we decided...

text.tspan: the bandaid was the fix, right?
I don't see that in my context.

g.text: asst: last session we rejected timeout-bump.
asst: the fix is retry jitter — patching now.

svg.text: github.com/immartian/bellamem · an applied instance of Recursive Emergence
